title: Infernal Farmer
description: A spicy twist on farming awaits in the heart of the Nether.
body:
## 🌋 Bring agriculture to the Nether! Infernal Farmer adds **new crops, unique foods, and farming mechanics** to make survival in the Nether both dangerous and delicious.


## 🌱 A New Way to Plant Your Seeds Discover the **Soul Fields**, a scorched Nether biome where farming becomes possible. Till **Soul Dirt** into farmland, plant infernal seeds, and keep your crops alive by humidifying the soil with **lava instead of water**.


## 🌶️ New Crops, Plants, and Seeds Infernal Farmer introduces a variety of fiery crops that thrive only in the Nether. **Ash Pepper | Blazeroot | Emberberry** And more to come in future updates!


## 🍲 Recipes with a Fiery Twist Examples of unique foods: **Cinder Latte | Glazed Hoglin Meat | Roasted Blazeroot** Almost every food comes with special effects — turning survival into strategy. ## 📖 Why Infernal Farmer? The Nether has always been barren for survivalists. This mod gives it **life without losing its infernal danger**. 🌱 Farm new crops 🔥 Cook unique recipes 💀 Expand survival possibilities in one of Minecraft’s harshest dimensions.
